description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a smooth, polished finish, extending into a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly. The barrel is elongated and ventilated with a series of circular cutouts along the handguard, providing both heat dissipation and a distinctive appearance. A large, round drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, indicating a high-capacity feeding system. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, with the front sight post visible at the end of the barrel. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined, and the overall design suggests a historical or vintage submachine gun style. The combination of wood and metal materials gives the rifle a sturdy, utilitarian look suitable for urban environments.
description: A vintage-style rifle with a wooden stock, ventilated metal barrel, and a prominent drum magazine. The design combines wood and metal for a robust, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the wooden stock, ventilated barrel, and the round drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: The right side view shows the smooth wooden stock, the trigger area, and the full length of the ventilated barrel.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the rear wooden stock, the trigger, and the drum magazine, with the barrel extending forward.
description_view_3: The left-rear view displays the wooden stock, the drum magazine, and the length of the ventilated barrel with the front sight post visible.
